title: VTC — Cross-Community Session Mint
description: POST /v1/auth/recognise request + response. Phase 3 M3.10; spec §8.4.

vec.description: Foreign-issued VerifiableEndorsementCredential. Carries the role grant. Must include a DataIntegrityProof eddsa-jcs-2022 signature.

vmc.description: Foreign-issued VerifiableMembershipCredential. Carries the membership proof + optional credentialStatus for live revocation.

sessionId.description: `xc-<uuid>` to distinguish cross-community sessions from local-member ones.

accessExpiresAt.description: Unix-seconds expiry. Clamped to min(jwt_default, earliest(vec.validUntil, vmc.validUntil)).

mappedRole.description: Local role from cross_community_roles.rego — NOT the foreign role.
